# `StrGetFromIndex`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET, X16, OK64  
**Parameters:** `a, b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>StrGetFromIndex( [ input string list ], [ index] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[ input string list ] - Input string list separated with #0</li>
    <li>[ index ] - Index of the list</li>
</ul>
Returns an integer address for a zero page pointer.


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Returns the zero page pointer address to the string at the reqested index.
</p>

<h3>Example</h3>
<code>
    // Splits "myString" separated by space ($20) to "list"
    strsplit(myString,list,key_space);

    zp:=strgetfromindex(list,1); // zp (pointer) now points to the second item in the list (0 is the first)

</code>


</div>
